Title: Stabilize Service Boundary
Description: Freeze and validate contracts for PriceOffer before extraction.
ExitCriteria: Contract tests are green for public/admin/internal endpoints.

Title: Capability Carve-Out
Description: Extract core PriceOffer use-cases behind an anti-corruption boundary.
ExitCriteria: Core capability runs independently in .NET 10 host.
Dependent consumers switched to new service contract.

Title: Fix validation issue DD002
Description: Boundary confidence is low; ownership should be verified manually.

Title: Fix validation issue DD003
Description: No API endpoints mapped to this domain design.

Title: Fix validation issue DD005
Description: No table ownership information found for this domain.

Title: Fix validation issue DD007
Description: Direct extraction strategy may be optimistic given boundary confidence.

Title: Write Path and Data Transition
Description: Move write path and ownership to service database.

Title: Background Jobs and Monolith Decommission
Description: Finalize cutover and remove obsolete monolith components.
ExitCriteria: No production traffic executes in extracted monolith modules.
Runbook and SLO ownership transferred to service team.
